column1: A Tornado Warning has been issued for parts of Manatee County. Download the ABC Action News App for the latest information.
I’m just north of Manatee along 41 in Apollo Beach. Feels like the calm before the storm out there and awfully warm. 😞🙏
Power just restored in Lakewood Ranch!
It’s crazy out there I live in Parrish! It’s never ending
you’re awake too I see. LOL! Go to sleep!
I'm actually in Connecticut. I'm hopefully coming home on Tuesday.
oh then you lucked out. …no tornado touchdowns…but the usual wind and rain havoc. Our standard gardenia got uprooted, no damage to lanai screens though.
It did get pretty windy here for a bit.
Is this ever going to stop ?
